economic_notes: Nation owns 5 business entities accounted for by modified equity method: Sunchild Construction GP Ltd., Sunchild Gravel GP Ltd., Sunchild Store (2005) Ltd., Sunchild Oil & Gas Ltd., Sunchild Utilities Limited Partnership. COVID-19 noted as subsequent event.
notes: 5 GBEs accounted for by modified equity method (not consolidated). Net earnings from entities of $286,190 included in surplus. Trust Funds - Other ($549,760) held with law firm for litigation of Agricultural Benefits and Treaty Land Entitlement claims. Sunchild Store (2005) Ltd. written off ($336,605) during year. COVID-19 noted as subsequent event. ISC funding calculated as sum of Grant ($864,227) + Fixed ($17,850,390) + Set ($2,658,113) + Flexible ($125,000) + ISET ($241,408) = $21,739,138 from ISC directly; Health Canada ($2,344,652) included in total government transfers. Annual debt service reflects full repayment of long-term CIBC loans ($549,998). Education expenses include School Operations, Contributions, O&M, Aboriginal Headstart, Skills Link, and Bussing lines.
